label: FACIS Simulation — MQTT Adapter
info:
ORCE-native MQTT adapter for the simulation runtime.

Driven by the Feeds tab via `sim.envelope` link-in. Splits the
envelope into per-feed messages and publishes to facis/* topics
preserving QoS and retain flags from the legacy flow.

Health endpoint preserved: GET /api/orce/health.

name: ORCE-native MQTT adapter (envelope → facis/* topics)
info:
Driven by the Feeds tab via link-in `sim.envelope`.
Topic naming and QoS preserved from the legacy facis-simulation-mqtt
HTTP-driven flow.
